title: memecylon ivohibense
intro: Memecylon ivohibense is a species of plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly found in Madagascar. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Memecylon ivohibense include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Memecylon ivohibense is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
